issues: The headline in the draft ('Sockeyes Add Humboldt Broncos to Hit List') is fabricated/paraphrased — the OCR shows the actual headline text is embedded in the byline paragraph and reads 'Add Humboldt Broncos to the Richmond Sockeyes' hit list' (a deck or lede, not a standalone headline). No bold standalone headline is clearly present in the OCR.

The long description omits a notable and colourful detail from the article: the Humboldt Broncos were booed by the Richmond Arena crowd for refusing to participate in the traditional post-game handshakes at centre ice.
review.correctedHeadline: Add Humboldt Broncos to the Richmond Sockeyes' Hit List
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat the Humboldt Broncos 5-4 to win the Abbott Cup Western Canadian junior-A championship series 4-3, advancing to the Centennial Cup.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-4 in Game 7 to win the Abbott Cup Western Canadian junior-A championship series 4-3, adding the Saskatchewan champions to their list of vanquished opponents — Nanaimo, Delta, Kelowna, and Red Deer. The Broncos, as Centennial Cup hosts in Humboldt, will face Richmond again starting Saturday in the national championship tournament. The Broncos were booed by a finally-noisy Richmond Arena crowd for failing to participate in the traditional post-game handshakes at centre ice.
review.notes: The OCR does not contain a clearly distinct bold headline separate from the byline/lede. The phrase 'Add Humboldt Broncos to the Richmond Sockeyes' hit list' appears to function as a deck headline or strong lede rather than a traditional headline — editor should confirm from the original image. The corrected headline above reflects the OCR text as closely as possible.
